holdings.infoBox: DIEM is an equity ETF with a total of 597 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.83%, Samsung Electronics at 8.92%, SK hynix at 7.71%, MediaTek at 2.77%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.37%.

overview.description: The Franklin Emerging Market Core Dividend Tilt Index ETF (DIEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund  is passively managed to invest in high dividend yield stocks across the emerging markets equity space. DIEM was launched on Jun 1, 2016 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
